Title: Route 799 (Climax Road) and Route 790 (Piney Road) Widen and Overlay
Description: Widen Route 799 (Climax Road) and Route 790 (Piney Road) to a uniform 20-foot width for a total of 10.5 miles.

Title: US 460 (Richmond Highway) and Route 630 Turn Lanes
Description: Construct the eastbound right-turn lane at US 460 (Richmond Highway) and Route 630. Reconstruct the eastbound right-turn taper to a full-length turn lane.

Title: N Main Street Intersection Improvements at US 460 Bypass
Description: Construct an RCUT at the intersection of US 460 Blacksburg Bypass and N Main Street/Farmingdale Lane.

Title: Route 3 Passing Lanes
Description: Construct northbound and southbound passing lane sections along Route 3 between Longwood Road and Potomac Mills Road.

Title: Rappahannock Community College Site Access Improvements
Description: Extend the existing eastbound left-turn lane and westbound right-turn lane at Route 33 and College Drive. Convert 30 existing parking spaces in the Rappahannock Community College parking lot to dedicated commuter spaces.

Title: US 460 "S" Curves
Description: Realign the eastbound US 460 lanes to be parallel to the existing westbound lanes with a grass median separating the two directions. Realign and widen the existing one-lane Wilkerson Mill Crossover to a two-lane facility. Remove the existing eastbound US 460 lanes. Modify/improve the five existing crossovers along US 460 from Overhill Trail to Hobson Hollow Lane.

Title: Heartland Regional Business Park Entrance
Description: Construct a northbound left-turn lane and a southbound right-turn lane at the entrance to the Heartland Regional Business Park at US 360 (Kings Highway) and Heartland Road.

Title: US 460 (Richmond Highway) and Route 609 (Stage Road) Turn Lanes
Description: Construct eastbound and westbound left-turn lanes and eastbound right-turn lane at US 460 (Richmond Highway) and Route 609 (Stage Road). Reconstruct the westbound right-turn taper to a full-length turn lane.

Title: US 29 (Thomas Nelson Highway) and Route 655 (Arrington Road) Right-Turn Lanes
Description: Construct a southbound right-turn lane at US 29 (Thomas Nelson Highway) and Route 655 (Arrington Road). Extend and widen the northbound right-turn lane at US 29 and Route 655.

Title: Additional Merging Lane on Northbound I-77 in Fort Chiswell
Description: Construct a travel lane on the northbound I-77 ramp through Exit 80 on northbound I-77/southbound I-81 in Fort Chiswell.

Title: I-64 Eastbound Pavement Marking
Description: Update pavement markings for the merging lane allocation for the I-295/I-64 eastbound merge.

Title: I-64 Capacity Improvements – Segment III
Description: Widen I-64 from four lanes to six lanes with a 12-foot shoulder in the existing median space from 1.05 miles west of Humelsine Parkway/Marquis Center Parkway (Exit 242) to Route 199 west of Williamsburg (Exit 234).

Title: Interchange Improvements at US 15/17/29 at US 15/17/29 Business
Description: Reconfigure the at-grade intersection of US 15/17/29 and US 15/17/29 Business to a grade-separated double roundabout interchange.  Construct a 20 space park and ride lot and shared use path.

Title: Shoulder Widening on US 501 (Brookneal Highway) from Route 607 to Route 655
Description: Widen the existing paved shoulder to a minimum 8-foot width along US-501 (Brookneal Highway) from Route 607 (Elliot Road) to Route 655 (Rocky Road).

Title: Route 3 (Kings Highway) and Route 624 (Flat Iron Road) Right-Turn Lane Extension
Description: Extend the eastbound right-turn lane at Route 3 (Kings Highway) and Route 624 (Flat Iron Road).

Title: US 360 (Richmond Road) and Route 619 (Mulberry Road/Rich Neck Road) Turn Lane Improvements
Description: Extend the eastbound and westbound left-turn lanes and the westbound right-turn lane at US 360 (Richmond Road) and Route 619 (Mulberry Road/Rich Neck Road).

Title: Route 151 (Rockfish Valley Highway) and Route 664 Right-Turn Lane
Description: Construct an off-set right-turn lane on southbound Route 151 (Rockfish Valley Highway) at Route 664 (Beech Grove Road/Glenthorne Loop).

Title: US 11 (Lee Highway) and Railroad Drive Intersection Improvements
Description: Construct a northbound left-turn lane and a southbound right-turn lane at US 11 (Lee Highway) and Railroad Drive.

Title: US 1 (Richmond Highway) at Potomac Creek Drive Turn Lane
Description: Construct a southbound left-turn lane at the intersection of US 1 (Richmond Highway) and Potomac Creek Drive.

Title: School Bus Road Realignment
Description: Realign School Bus Road to intersect with Route 208 at Chalklevel Road, with a shared left/through lane and a dedicated right-turn lane on the new School Bus Road northbound approach. Construct dedicated eastbound and westbound left- and right-turn lanes on Route 208. Construct bike lanes on the east, west, and south legs.

Title: I-81 Exit 222 Deceleration and Acceleration Lane Extensions
Description: Extend the northbound acceleration and southbound deceleration lane on I-81 at Exit 222 interchange.

Title: I-81 Southbound Safety Improvements from MM 167.4 to MM 169.5
Description: Apply high-friction surface treatment on southbound I-81 between MM 167.4 and MM 169.5. Close the southbound I-81 off-ramp at Exit 167. Widen the inside shoulders and improve superelevation within two curves on I-81 southbound.

Title: US 15 (James Madison Highway) and Route 636 Turn Lanes
Description: Construct northbound and southbound left-turn and right-turn lanes at US 15 (James Madison Highway) and Route 636 (Fransico Road/Stage Coach Road). Close one entrance to the gas station in the southwest corner of the intersection.

Title: US 58 ALT (Norton-Coeburn Road) and US 23 (Orby Cantrell Highway) Northbound Off-Ramp Improvements
Description: Eliminate the channelized right-turn lane on the northbound off-ramp at US 58 ALT (Norton-Coeburn Road) and US 23 (Orby Cantrell Highway) and replace with a stop-controlled right-turn lane.

Title: Construct Left- and Right-Turn Lanes at US 501 (Brookneal Highway) and Route 633
Description: Construct left- and right-turn lanes from US 501 (Brookneal Highway) to Route 633 (Epsons Road) and left- and right-turn lanes from US 501 to Route 633 (Phelps Creek Road).

Title: US 58  Eastbound Turn Lane at US 58 Bypass/US 220
Description: Construct an eastbound right-turn lane on US 58 (A. L. Philpott Highway) at the US 58 Bypass/US 220 (William F. Stone Highway) interchange.

Title: I-81 Exit 323 Deceleration and Acceleration Lane Extensions
Description: Extend the northbound deceleration lane and southbound acceleration lane on I-81 at the Exit 323 interchange.

Title: US 60 (W James Anderson Highway) and Route 56 (S James River Road) Turn Lanes
Description: Construct an eastbound left-turn lane and westbound right-turn lane at US 60 (W James Anderson Highway) and Route 56 (S James River Highway).

Title: US 52 (Poplar Camp Road) North Spot Improvements
Description: Realign the horizontal curve on US 52 (Poplar Camp Road) at Route 770 (Hanging Tree Road). Improve sight distance at Route 705 (Coon Ridge Road) and US 52. Widen shoulders to six feet along the segment of US 52 between the two intersections.

Title: I-81 Exit 315 Deceleration Lane Extension
Description: Extend the northbound deceleration lane on I-81 at Exit 315.

Title: Extend I-64 Acceleration/Deceleration Lanes at Weigh Station
Description: Extend the acceleration and deceleration lanes on I-64 at the weigh station at mile marker 203 in Henrico County.

Title: Route 609 and Route 683 Safety Improvements
Description: Regrade the slope in the southeast corner of Route 609 at Route 683 to improve sight distance. Replace existing static flashers with actuated flashers on the westbound approach.

Title: I-81 Exit 213 Acceleration Lanes
Description: Extend the northbound and southbound acceleration lanes on I-81 at the Exit 213 (US 11) interchange.

Title: US 15 (Farmville Road) – Left- and Right-Turn Lanes at Route 665
Description: Construct new northbound and southbound left-turn lanes on US 15 (Farmville Road) at Route 665 (Abilene Road/Worsham Road). Extend the existing southbound right-turn lane on US 15.

Title: Route 711 (Huguenot Trail) and Route 607 (Huguenot Springs Road) Intersection Improvements
Description: Combine Route 607 (Huguenot Springs Road) and Route 721 (Woolridge Road) and realign with Route 711 (Huguenot Trail). Construct a westbound left-turn lane at Route 607 and Route 711.

Title: I-81 Exit 296 Acceleration and Deceleration Lane Extensions
Description: Extend the northbound acceleration lane and the southbound deceleration lane on I-81 at Exit 296.

Title: Intersection Reconstruction at US 460 (Prince Edward Highway) and Route 307
Description: Reconfigure the right-turn lane from Route 307 (Holly Farms Road) to US 460 (Prince Edward Highway) and remove a westbound through lane on US 460. Install raised islands with pavement markings at the intersection of US 460 and Route 307.

Title: Route 639 (Ladysmith Road) and Route 738 (Partlow Road/Anderson Mill Road) Intersection Realignment
Description: Realign the intersection of Route 639 (Ladysmith Road) and Route 738 (Partlow Road/Anderson Mill Road), modify the southbound approach to be stop-controlled, and construct a westbound right-turn lane.

Title: US 501 (L P Bailey Memorial Highway) Passing Lane
Description: Construct northbound and southbound passing lane sections along US 501 (L P Bailey Memorial Highway) in Halifax County between Route 610 (Murphy Grove Road) and Route 501/Route 643 (Cedar Fork Road).

Title: US 1 (Boydton Plank Road) and Route 627 (Courthouse Road) Intersection Realignment
Description: Realign intersection of US 1 (Boydton Plank Road) and Route 627 (Courthouse Road) and provide a dedicated southbound left-turn lane and right-turn lane. Construct a sidewalk on Route 627 and install a marked crosswalk at US 1 and Route 627.

Title: Wytheville Connector Road Phase II
Description: Construct a new roadway connection from Peppers Ferry Road to Lithia Road in the Town of Wytheville.

Title: Skiffes Creek Connector
Description: Construct a new two-lane roadway (Green Mount Parkway) between Route 143 (Merrimac Trail) and US 60 (Pocahontas Trail). Install a traffic signal, an eastbound left-turn lane and a westbound right-turn lane at Route 143 and Green Mount Parkway. Install an eastbound left-turn lane and a westbound right-turn lane and modify the traffic signal at US 60 and Green Mount Parkway.

Title: I-81 Exit 220 and Exit 221 Deceleration and Acceleration Lane Extensions
Description: Extend all acceleration and deceleration lanes on I-81 at the Exit 220 interchange (Route 262). Extend I-81 southbound acceleration lane at Exit 221 (I-64).

Title: US 522 (Front Royal Pike) and Route 644 (Papermill Road) Right-Turn Lane
Description: Extend the eastbound right-turn lane at US 522 (Front Royal Pike) and Route 644 (Papermill Road).

Title: Route 53 and Route 618 Roundabout
Description: Construct a roundabout at Route 53 and Route 618. Construct pedestrian accommodations within the project limits.

Title: Route 288 Interchange Improvements at US 250
Description: Interchange improvements at Route 288 (World War II Veterans Memorial Highway) and US 250 (Broad Street Road). Construct signals and turn lanes at the intersections of Route 288 ramps and US 250.

Title: S Washington Street Multimodal Improvements
Description: Remove the channelized right-turn lane from northbound Hillwood Avenue onto S Washington Street. Remove the drive aisle between businesses to the north of the intersection and widen adjacent sidewalks. Construct a new transit plaza at S Washington Street and Hillwood Avenue with new crosswalks and pedestrian push buttons for accessing the transit plaza.

Title: Route 311 and Route 419 Intersection Safety and Congestion Improvements
Description: Convert an existing signal to a roundabout at Route 311 and Route 419. Construct bicycle and pedestrian accommodations and provide access management to adjacent businesses.

Title: Improve Interchange at I-195 and Laburnum Avenue
Description: Reconfigure the northbound I-195 off-ramp at W Laburnum Avenue to include separate left-turn and right-turn lanes. Construct a single-lane roundabout at the southbound I-95 off-ramp at W Laburnum Avenue.

Title: US 58 Business (Martinsville Highway) and US 311 (Berry Hill Road) Left- and Right-Turn Lanes
Description: Construct a left-turn lane, shared left-through lane, and channelized right-turn lane on the northbound approach of US 311 (Berry Hill Road) at US 58 Business (Martinsville Highway). Extend the existing eastbound right-turn lane on US 58 Business at US 311.

Title: I-64 Widening from I-295 to Exit 205 (Bottoms Bridge)
Description: Widen I-64 from four travel lanes to six travel lanes from I-295 to Exit 205 (Bottoms Bridge)

Title: US 15 (James Madison Highway) and Route 53 Roundabout
Description: Construct a roundabout at the intersection of US 15 (James Madison Highway) and Route 53. Construct sidewalk, a shared-use path, and a crosswalk within the project limits.

Title: US 23/58 Access Management with Park and Ride
Description: Construct an eastbound left-turn lane and a westbound right-turn lane on US 23/58 at Route 619 (Filter Plant Ford/Wilcox Avenue). Install a concrete barrier to eliminate six median openings on US 23/58. Construct a new park and ride lot in the northeast corner of US 23/58 and Route 619.

Title: Route 156 (Cold Harbor Road) and Caitlin Road Turn Lane Improvement
Description: Widen Route 156 (Cold Harbor Road) to provide a westbound left-turn lane onto Caitlin Road and an 8-foot paved shoulder.

Title: US 15 and Route 692 Roundabout
Description: Construct a roundabout at the intersection of US 15 (Farmville Road) and Route 133 (Kingsville Road).

Title: Elkhardt Road Geometric, Bike, and Pedestrian Improvements
Description: Widen Elkhardt Road to 11-foot travel lanes between Tillers Ridge Drive and Ruthers Road/Pocoshock Boulevard. Construct a multi-use path along the south side of Elkhardt Road and the east side of Starlight Lane. Install marked crosswalks along and across Elkhardt Road.

Title: Cogbill and Hopkins Park and Ride Lot
Description: Construct a 142-space park and ride lot on Cogbill Road in Chesterfield County. Provide a sidewalk connection to Hopkins Road on the south side of Cogbill Road and signalized pedestrian crossings at Cogbill Road and Hopkins Road.

Title: US 29 Business (Main Street) Right Turn Lane at Route 1466 (Lynchmill Road)
Description: Construct a right-turn lane on the southbound approach of Route 29 Business (Main Street) and a right-turn lane on Route 1466 (Lynch Mill Road).

Title: Route 122 and Route 636 Intersection Safety Improvements
Description: Construct a roundabout at the intersection of Route 122 and Route 636.

Title: US 360 (Richmond Tappahannock Highway) and Route 30 (King William Road) Intersection Improvements
Description: Construct eastbound and westbound right-turn lanes at US 360 (Richmond Tappahannock Highway) and Route 30 (King William Road). Construct an offset right-turn lane at Route 30 (King William Road) and Sharon Road. Provide sidewalk and a signalized crosswalk on the south side of Route 30 (King William Road).

Title: Route 622 (Lynbrook Road) Reconstruction and Realignment
Description: Construct a new alignment for Route 622 (Lynbrook Road) between Lawyers Road and approximately 800 feet west of Meadowbrook Lane. Align Lynbrook Road with the intersection of Lawyers Road and Waterlick Road, adding a fourth leg to the intersection.

Title: US 60 Bridge Replacement over Lake Maury (The Mariners' Lake)
Description: Replace the existing six-lane bridge on US 60 (Warwick Boulevard) over Lake Maury (The Mariners' Lake). Construct a southbound through lane on US 60 at the intersection with the Riverside Regional Medical Center. Construct a 10-foot sidewalk parallel to US 60 from J Clyde Morris Boulevard to the existing sidewalk west of Harpersville Road.

Title: US 17/US 50 (Millwood Pike) and Route 655 (Sulphur Springs Road) Intersection Improvements
Description: Reconstruct the westbound approach at US 17/US 50 (Millwood Pike) and Route 655 (Sulphur Springs Road) to provide a dedicated left-turn lane and right-turn lane.

Title: US 17 (Carrollton Boulevard) at US 258 (Brewers Neck Boulevard) Intersection Capacity Improvements
Description: Construct a four-lane roadway with landscaped median on a new alignment to connect Spadea Way to the intersection of US 17 (Carrollton Boulevard) and US 258 (Brewers Neck Boulevard). Construct an eastbound through lane, a southbound left-turn lane, and a second northbound left-turn lane at US 17 and US 258.

Title: Colonial Avenue Improvements
Description: Construct bike lanes and landscaped medians on Colonial Avenue between Winding Way Road and Overland Road. Install roundabouts and crosswalks on Colonial Avenue at Winding Way Road, McNeil Drive, and Overland Road. Install sidewalks along Colonial Avenue between Winding Way Road and Clearfield Road.

Title: South Main Street and Martin Luther King Jr. Way Improvements
Description: Extend the existing median located on MLK Jr. Way to Mason Street and further east. Construct a right-turn lane on the northbound approach of South Main Street at MLK Jr. Way and left-turn lanes in each direction of the intersection along Mason Street at MLK Jr. Way. Update existing signals and construct a shared-use path.

Title: Route 115 and Lila Drive Intersection Safety Improvements
Description: Install a traffic signal at Route 115 (Plantation Road) and Lila Drive and relocate the Harris/Exelis driveway to Lila Drive to make a four-leg intersection. Construct sidewalks, crosswalks, and pedestrian-actuated signals.

Title: Route 277 (Fairfax Pike) Widening and Access Management
Description: Reconstruct Route 277 (Fairfax Pike) to provide a four-lane, divided roadway with access management improvements from the I-81 Exit 307 northbound ramps to Double Church Road, including the addition of turn lanes and relocation of Aylor Road to a new intersection with Stickley Drive. Construct a shared-use path along the south side of Route 277.

Title: US 11 (W Main Street) and US 19 (Porterfield Highway SW) Intersection Improvements
Description: Construct a southbound right-turn lane at US 11 (W Main Street) and US 19 (Porterfield Highway SW).

Title: I-81 Exit 35 Interchange Modifications
Description: Construct left-turn lanes on Route 107 (Whitetop Road) at the I-81 Exit 35 northbound and southbound on-ramps. Construct right-turn lanes on the I-81 Exit 35 northbound and southbound off-ramps.

Title: US 460 (County Drive) and Route 630 (Bull Hill Road) Intersection Improvements
Description: Construct dedicated northbound and southbound left-turn lanes and modify the traffic signal at US 460 (County Drive) and Route 630 (Bull Hill Road) to operate with eight phases. Construct an eastbound directional median opening at the Pilot Travel Center.

Title: Route 206 and Route 218/Route 632 Right-Turn Lane
Description: Install a westbound right-turn lane at Route 206 (Dahlgren Road) and Route 218 (Caledon Road)/Route 632 (St Pauls Road). Modify the traffic signal to accommodate the new lane configuration.

Title: Improve I-95 Interchange at Maury Street
Description: Improve and shift southbound I-95 ramps at Maury Street interchange and construct a one-lane roundabout at convergence of the ramps at Maury Street (off-ramps) and E 4th Street (on-ramp) including sidewalks.

Title: I-64 at US 13 (Northampton Boulevard) Interchange Modification
Description: Reconstruct the I-64 eastbound off-ramp terminus at US 13 (Northampton Boulevard) as a signalized intersection with left- and right-turn lanes. Reconstruct the I-64 westbound ramp terminus at US 13 to add new left- and right-turn lanes.

Title: I-264 Interchange Improvements: Westbound I-64 Ramp to Eastbound I-264
Description: Construct a new collector-distributor road along eastbound I-264 with interchange ramp reconfigurations at Newtown Road and Witchduck Road. Construct a two-lane flyover ramp from westbound I-64 to eastbound I-264. Construct a four-lane flyover ramp with sidewalk and shared-use path to connect Greenwich Road and Cleveland Street. Install a sidewalk on Newtown Road and a shared-use path on Greenwich Road.

Title: US 13 (Lankford Highway) Shoulder Widening
Description: Widen the inside paved shoulder and add rumble strips along southbound US 13 (Lankford Highway) between Exmore and Nassawadox.

Title: Route 155 (Courthouse Road) Shoulder Widening
Description: Widen paved and gravel shoulders on five miles of Route 155 (Courthouse Road) in New Kent County to provide accommodations for bicyclists.

Title: I-95 – Improve Ramp Area at Franklin Street
Description: Construct a new right-turn lane on the southbound I-95 Exit Ramp 74B at the intersection with E Franklin Street. Improve the signal at the ramp intersection to give priority to traffic on the southbound I-95 Exit Ramp approach.

Title: US 13 (Lankford Highway) and Route 175 (Chincoteague Road) Intersection Improvements
Description: Install lighting and improved signage at the intersection of US 13 (Lankford Highway) and Route 175 (Chincoteague Road). Install curb to define driveways at the intersection.

Title: US 17 (Tidewater Trail) Corridor Improvements
Description: Construct spot improvements along US 17 (Tidewater Trail) in the Town of Tappahannock, and construct an RCUT on US 17 and Winston Road.

Title: Luray Intersection Improvements
Description: Construct a roundabout at US 211 Business (West Main Street) and Northcott Drive. Construct a westbound left-turn lane at US 211 (Lee Highway) and Northcott Drive. Convert US 211 and US 211 Business to right-in/right-out and construct a concrete island.

Title: University Drive Extension
Description: Extend University Drive from US 29 (Fairfax Boulevard) to Eaton Place. Construct sidewalk and crosswalks along the roadway extension.

Title: US 11 (Lee Highway) Widening
Description: Widen US 11 (Lee Highway) from two lanes to four lanes with a raised median and a shared-use path on the south side. Install new traffic signals at US 11 and Merchant Trace and US 11 and Cascade Drive. Construct left- and right-turn lanes at existing and proposed intersections within the project area. Construct a new park and ride lot.

Title: Clifton Forge Business Park Access Road
Description: Construct a new roadway connection from Hickory Avenue to US 60 Business (Main Street). Construct a westbound right-turn lane on US 60 Business at Hickory Avenue.

Title: Coliseum Drive Extension – Segment A
Description: Construct a new four-lane roadway extension on Coliseum Drive from Hampton Roads Center Parkway to Butler Farm Road. Construct a new 10-foot multi-use path on the west side of the roadway and a 5-foot sidewalk on the east side of the roadway.

Title: US 501 (N Main Street) and Route 360 (Mountain Road) Turning Radius Improvements
Description: Increase the southbound right-turn radius at the intersection of US 501 (N Main Street) and Route 360 (Mountain Road). Reconstruct the existing sidewalk on the west side of US 501, the north side of Route 360, and the east side of Maple Avenue.

Title: I-81 Auxiliary Lanes from Exit 141 to Exit 143
Description: Extend the auxiliary lane on northbound I-81 from the entrance ramp at Exit 141 to the exit ramp at Exit 143. Extend the auxiliary lane on southbound I-81 from the entrance ramp at Exit 143 to the exit ramp at Exit 141.

Title: US 15 Business (S Main Street) and Milnwood Road Intersection Improvements
Description: Construct northbound and southbound left-turn lanes and a southbound channelized right-turn lane at US 15 Business (S Main Street) and Milnwood Road. Reconstruct the signal and add signalized pedestrian crossings on the south and west legs.

Title: 10th Street Reconstruction
Description: Reconstruct 10th Street between US 11 (Williamson Road) and Andrews Road to provide bike lanes, curb and gutter, and sidewalk in both directions. Construct northbound and southbound left-turn lanes at 10th Street and Hunt Avenue. Install crosswalks and pedestrian signals at 10th Street and US 11 and at 10th Street and Hunt Avenue.

Title: US 17 Business (Main Street) and Route 3 Intersection Improvements
Description: Construct an additional northbound right-turn lane on US 17 Business. Convert an existing southbound through lane on US 17 Business to a second left-turn lane and the existing westbound right-turn lane on Route 3 to a left-through-right lane. Add crosswalks and pedestrian signals across the north and east intersection legs.

Title: US 11 (Lee Highway) and Route 107 (Whitetop Road) Intersection Improvements
Description: Provide back-to-back left-turn lanes on the southbound approach at US 11 (Lee Highway) and Route 107 (Whitetop Road).

Title: US 11 (Valley Pike) and Apple Valley Road Turn Lane Improvements
Description: Extend the southbound right-turn lane at US 11 (Valley Pike) and Apple Valley Road. Close one commercial entrance.

Title: W Broadway Avenue and N 21st Avenue Intersection Improvements
Description: Upgrade signal equipment and install pedestrian signals at W Broadway Avenue and N 21st Avenue. Provide marked crosswalks and directional curb ramps across all legs.

Title: Route 811 (Thomas Jefferson Road) and Route 622 (Waterlick Road) Turn Lane Improvements
Description: Construct northbound right-turn lanes at Route 811 (Thomas Jefferson Road) and Route 622 (Waterlick Road).

Title: I-81 Exit 19 Ramp Improvements
Description: Remove the ramp from US 11 (E Main Street) northbound to I-81 southbound. Install a signal on US 11 at the I-81 southbound off-ramp terminus with a left-turn lane from US 11 to the I-81 southbound on-ramp. Install a signal on US 11 at the I-81 northbound off-ramp terminus and add a right-turn lane on the off-ramp approach. Relocate the intersection of US 11 and Empire Drive farther west of the I-81 interchange.

Title: Reconstruct Intersection at US 460 Business (Timberlake Road) and Route 622
Description: Reconstruct the left-turn lanes on US 460 Business (Timberlake Road) to Route 622 (Waterlick Road) to be offset from the through-lanes. Construct a 4-foot median on the Route 622 approaches to the intersection with US 460 Business. Convert the driveways adjacent to the intersection to right-in/right-out only.

Title: General Thomas Highway Signalization Project
Description: Construct traffic signals on Route 671 (General Thomas Highway) at the US 58 (Southampton Parkway) eastbound and westbound ramp intersections.

Title: US 460 Bypass at N Franklin Street Off-Ramp
Description: Construct an off-ramp from eastbound US 460 Bypass to northbound N Franklin Street.

Title: US 11 (Martinsburg Pike) Additional Through Lane
Description: Construct an additional southbound through lane on US 11 (Martinsburg Pike) between I-81 Exit 317 and Route 37.

Title: Extend Northbound I-95 Deceleration Lane at Hermitage Road
Description: Construct a deceleration lane and shoulder on northbound I-95 at Exit 78 to Hermitage Road. Replace existing variable shoulder width (8-10 feet) with a consistent 10-foot shoulder width.

Title: I-81 Exit 245 Northbound Off-Ramp Realignment
Description: Realign the northbound I-81 Exit 245 off-ramp to tie into Route 253 (Port Republic Road) at the intersection with Forest Hill Road.

Title: US 13 (Lankford Highway) Intersection Improvements
Description: Install a traffic signal, extend northbound right-turn lane, and extend southbound left-turn lane at US 13 (Lankford Highway) and Country Place. Extend northbound left-turn and right-turn lanes at US 13 and Stone Road.

Title: US 460 (E Main Street) Improvements
Description: Reconstruct US 460 (E Main Street) from Thompson Memorial Drive and Lynchburg Turnpike. Construct a traffic signal at US 460 and Lynchburg Turnpike and dedicated left-turn and right-turn lanes at the northbound approach on Lynchburg Turnpike. Construct a right-turn lane on the westbound approach on US 460 at Thompson Memorial Drive. Construct sidewalks and bike lanes.

Title: N Franklin Street and Cambria Street Intersection Improvements
Description: Realign and upgrade the intersection at N Franklin Street and Cambria Street. Improve access management and signal coordination on N Franklin Street between Cambria Street and Independence Boulevard.  Construct sidewalk, crosswalks and bike lanes.

Title: US 29 (Seminole Trail) and US 33 (Spotswood Trail) Intersection Improvements
Description: Modify the westbound approach of US 29 (Seminole Trail) and US 33 (Spotswood Trail) to provide two left-turn lanes, one through lane, and one shared through-right lane. Construct one eastbound right-turn lane at the 35 Jennings Loop property and one eastbound left-turn lane at US 33 and Moore Road. Provide sidewalks and bike lanes on US 33 east of US 29.

Title: US 21 (Independence Avenue) and US 58 (Main Street) Intersection Turning Radius Improvement
Description: Modify the intersection of US 21 (Independence Avenue) and US 58 (Main Street) to provide an adequate turning radius for heavy vehicle traffic.

Title: Atkinson Boulevard – Four Lanes
Description: Construct an east-west four-lane divided roadway and a shared-use path between Warwick Boulevard and Jefferson Avenue, crossing I-64 and the CSX Railroad.

Title: Southbound I-81 Auxiliary Lane from Exit 143 to Exit 141
Description: Construct an auxiliary lane on southbound I-81 between Exit 143 and Exit 141.

Title: Longhill Road Widening
Description: Widen Longhill Road from two lanes to four lanes from Route 199 to Olde Towne Road. Construct a roundabout at Longhill Road and Williamsburg Plantation Drive. Construct a shared-use path along Longhill Road from Williamsburg West Drive to Glenburnie Road. Provide access management and pedestrian crossing improvements at adjacent driveways and intersections within the corridor.

Title: Route 606 (Raphine Road) Intersection Improvements at I-81 Exit 205
Description: Modify the I-81 Exit 205 northbound and southbound off-ramps at Route 606 (Raphine Road) to add a dedicated northbound right-turn lane. Install an eastbound right-turn lane at Route 606 and I-81 Exit 205 southbound ramps.  Install a westbound right-turn lane at Route 606 and Oakland Circle/Old B&O Road.

Title: US 58 (Wilderness Road) Truck Climbing Lane
Description: Construct a truck climbing lane on eastbound US 58 (Wilderness Road) from 1,00 feet west of the Scott County line to the Scott County line.

Title: US 58 (Duff-Patt Highway) Truck Climbing Lane Phase II
Description: Construct a truck climbing lane on eastbound US 58 (Duff-Patt Highway) to the west of Phase I.

Title: Route 6 (Patterson Avenue) at Parham Road Intersection
Description: Construct dual left-turn lanes on eastbound and westbound Route 6 (Patterson Avenue) at Parham Road. Construct dual left-turn lanes on northbound Parham Road at Route 6. Construct sidewalks, crosswalks, and pedestrian signals at the intersection.

Title: US 460 (Orange Avenue) and Hollins Road Intersection Improvements
Description: Construct eastbound and westbound offset left-turn lanes, an eastbound right-turn lane, and a northbound right-turn lane at US 460 (Orange Avenue) and Hollins Road. Modify the existing traffic signal to add flashing yellow arrow and pedestrian signals. Provide a sidewalk and crosswalks.

Title: US 58 (Virginia Beach Boulevard) Corridor Intersection Capacity and Safety
Description: Remove the frontage road on westbound US 58 (Virginia Beach Boulevard) and provide a new westbound through lane from Newtown Road to Clarence Street. Construct a westbound through lane and extend existing storage length for eastbound dual left-turn lanes at the intersection of US 58 and Newtown Road.

Title: Route 419 Widening, Safety, and Multimodal Improvements
Description: Construct an additional southbound lane on Route 419 from Ogden Road to the southbound US 220 on-ramp. Construct bike lanes, sidewalk, and crosswalks throughout the project corridor.

Title: Route 656 Sliding Hill Road Corridor
Description: Widen Sliding Hill Road from Atlee Station Road to New Ashcake Road from two lanes to four lanes and construct new bike lanes. Construct a new turn lane on Sliding Hill Road into the driveway. Construct a new crosswalk and ADA ramp at the intersection of Atlee Station Road and Sliding Hill Road.

Title: Lafayette Boulevard and Harrison Road Turn Lane Extension
Description: Extend the southbound right-turn lane at Lafayette Boulevard and Harrison Road back to Lee Street. Construct a sidewalk along Lafayette Boulevard between Harrison Road and Lee Street.

Title: US 29 (Seminole Trail) and Route 607 Intersection Improvements
Description: Construct a westbound left-turn lane at US 29 (Seminole Trail) and Route 607 (Matthew Mill Road/Cedar Grove Road). Construct an eastbound and westbound left-turn lane at Route 607 and the Sheetz driveway. Modify the traffic signal to accommodate the dual left-turn lanes. Add a bike lane on westbound Route 607.

Title: US 301 (James Madison Parkway) and Bennion Road Turn Lane Extensions
Description: Extend the northbound and southbound left-turn lanes and southbound right-turn lane at the intersection of US 301 (James Madison Parkway) and Bennion Road.

Title: US 221 (Forest Road) Congestion and Safety Improvements
Description: Construct left-turn and right-turn lanes on the westbound approach of Route 126 (Graves Mill Road) at US 221 (Forest Road). Extend the storage of the right-turn lane on Gristmill Drive at US 221. Add pedestrian crosswalks at US 221 and Route 126, and at US 222 and Gristmill Drive.

Title: Route 419 (Electric Road) & US 221 (Brambleton Avenue) Adaptive Traffic Control
Description: Install adaptive traffic control on seven existing traffic signals on Route 419 (Electric Road). Install adaptive traffic control on four existing traffic signals on US 221 (Brambleton Avenue).

Title: Turn Lane Extension at Dahlgren Naval Base
Description: Connect and extend the existing right-turn lanes along northbound US 301 (James Madison Parkway) from Commerce Drive to Bennion Road.

Title: Southbound I-95 Rappahannock River Crossing
Description: Construct three collector-distributor lanes along southbound I-95 starting from 0.5 miles north of Exit 133 to Exit 130. Modify the on-ramp from US 17 (Exit 133) by constructing an additional lane onto southbound I-95. Modify the off-ramp to westbound Route 3 (Exit 130) to add a channelized right-turn lane to Carl D Silver Parkway and three right-turn lanes at the signalized intersection with westbound Route 3. Replace the existing bridge on I-95 southbound at Exit 133.

Title: Modify I-95 Southbound Off-Ramp at Route 784 and Add Signal
Description: Modify the alignment of the southbound I-95 off-ramp terminus at Route 784 (Dale Boulevard) and install a new traffic signal.

Title: Extend Northbound I-95 Acceleration Lane at N Belvidere Street
Description: Extend the existing northbound acceleration lane from N Belvidere Street on-ramp onto northbound I-95/westbound I-64 (Exit 76).

Title: US 220 (Franklin Road) Communications and Adaptive System Project
Description: Install intersection video cameras and adaptive traffic control system at the following three intersections along Route 220 (Franklin Road): Route 862 (Valley Avenue/Southern Hills Drive), Crossbow Circle/Pheasant Ridge Road, and Route 789 (Old Rocky Mount Road). Install new intersection video cameras and radios for communication/coordination of signals at Route 220 and Route 679 (Buck Mountain Road/Stable Road) and Route 220 and Route 675 (Indian Grave Road SW/Clearbrook Village Lane).

Title: I-95/I-64 Overlap Emergency Pull-Offs
Description: Construct six new emergency pull-offs within the I-95/I-64 overlap.

Title: Commuter Lot Expansion I-95 East of Exit 140
Description: Expand the commuter parking lot constructed as part of the Exit 140 interchange project by adding approximately 300 spaces to the adjacent parcel and approximately 200 spaces at a secondary location near relocated Wyche Road including bicycle racks.

Title: Leatherwood Lane Improvements
Description: Construct a left-turn lane on Leatherwood Lane at the intersection with W Cumberland Road. Construct a pedestrian crosswalk across Leatherwood Lane to the bus stop at the corner of W Cumberland Road and Leatherwood Lane.

Title: Multimodal Improvements along Roanoke Boulevard
Description: Construct an 8-foot wide sidewalk on the north side of Roanoke Boulevard from the Salem Health and Rehabilitation Center to the Adult Care Center. Improve ADA accessibility of the transit stops at the front of Salem Health and Rehabilitation Center, the intersection of Hemlock Road and Roanoke Boulevard, and the Adult Care Center.

Title: Downtown Lynchburg Bus for Circulator Service
Description: Provide an additional bus for a fixed circulation route in the central business district of Lynchburg.

Title: Warrenton Park and Ride Lot Expansion
Description: Expand the Warrenton Park and Ride facility at the intersection of US 15/29 (Lee Highway) and Route 605 (Colonial Road/Dumfries Road) by adding 150 new parking spaces, bike racks, and sidewalk around the park and ride.

Title: Brandy Station Park and Ride Lot Expansion at US 15 (James Madison Highway) and Route 663
Description: Expand the Brandy Station Park and Ride facility at the intersection of US 15 (James Madison Highway) and Route 663 by adding 50 new parking spaces.

Title: Lifecore Drive Shared-Use Path
Description: Construct a shared-use path on southbound Lifecore Drive from Village Creek Drive to the driveway north of Parkway Lane.

Title: Hampton Roads Transit Regional Commuter Express Bus
Description: Purchase five transit buses to establish two new express commuter routes to Naval Station Norfolk and increase service frequency on one existing local route.

Title: US 58 and Godwin Boulevard Park and Ride Lot Improvements
Description: Upgrade the existing park and ride lot northeast of US 58 to have 115 paved parking spaces (including five handicap accessible spaces), drainage improvements, and lighting.

Title: Pedestrian Improvements on Southbound US 17 (George Washington Memorial Highway)
Description: Construct approximately 2,500 feet of sidewalk along southbound US 17 (George Washington Memorial Highway) in the Gloucester Point area from Bellhaven Drive to south of Lafayette Heights Drive.

Title: Pedestrian Improvements at US 17 (George Washington Memorial Highway) and US 17 Business
Description: Construct a sidewalk along US 17 southbound and along US 17 Business connecting to existing sidewalks on either side of the intersection with US 17. Install crosswalks and pedestrian signals at the intersection of US 17 and US 17 Business.

Title: Transit Accessibility Improvements on Edgewood Street
Description: Install sidewalks and ADA ramps along Edgewood Street SW between Windsor Avenue SW and Memorial Avenue SW.

Title: ART Service Restructuring and Expansion
Description: Purchase eight 40-foot transit buses to provide higher frequency service. Improve bus stops by replacing existing signs and shelters.

Title: Arlington TDM Strategies for the I-66 Corridor
Description: Provide a new Mobile Commuter Store to serve locations along I-66. Provide intensive public outreach services and additional transit maps and schedules. Enhance the existing vanpool program and support on-demand carpool app development.

Title: US 220 Business (Virginia Avenue) Pedestrian Accommodations
Description: Provide marked crosswalks and pedestrian signals on the south and west legs of US 220 Business (Virginia Avenue) and Wheeler Avenue.  Consolidate commercial entrances and construct a sidewalk on the west side of US 220 Business between Wheeler Avenue and Printers Lane.

Title: Courthouse Road Multi-Use Trail
Description: Construct a multi-use trail from Salem Church Road to Courts Complex Road.

Title: Hopkins Road Sidewalk Improvements
Description: Install a sidewalk along the west side of Hopkins Road between Bonniebank Road and South Melody Road. Install marked crosswalks along Hopkins Road.

Title: Harrowgate Road and Cougar Trail Sidewalk Improvements
Description: Install a sidewalk along the east side of Harrowgate Road and along the north side of Cougar Trail. Install marked crosswalks across the north and east legs at Harrowgate Road and Cougar Trail.

Title: Loretto Park and Ride
Description: Upgrade the existing park and ride lot in the southwest corner of US 17 (Tidewater Trail) and Rectory Road to have 22 paved parking spaces (including 2 handicap accessible spaces), drainage improvements, and lighting.

Title: Waynesboro Towne Center Park and Ride
Description: Construct a two-lane access road for the Waynesboro Towne Center Park and Ride. Install an eastbound left-turn lane at Shenandoah Village Drive and a new access road. Construct a sidewalk and marked pedestrian crossings on the access road. Install a bus stop with bus shelters and bike racks. Improve the existing park and ride lot by increasing capacity and installing lighting.

Title: Smart Way Commuter Bus Line Vehicles
Description: Purchase three new buses to establish the Smart Way Express commuter line between Virginia Tech and Roanoke.

Title: Plantation Road Bike/Ped/Streetscape Phase II
Description: Construct sidewalk, curb, and gutter along the west side of Plantation Road between Walrond Drive and Gander Way. Add pedestrian signals and crosswalks at the Gander Way signal.

Title: US 11 (West Main Street) Sidewalk Installation
Description: Install sidewalk along the south side of US 11 (West Main Street) between Technology Drive and Daugherty Road. Add signalized crosswalks across all legs at the intersection of US 11 and Daugherty Road.

Title: Blacksburg Transit Expansion Bus Purchase
Description: Purchase two new articulated transit buses to support increased ridership in Blacksburg.

Title: I-95 ITS Low Bridge Warning System
Description: Install a low bridge warning system, consisting of a pole-mounted vehicle presence detector and an overheight vehicle sensor, on northbound and southbound I-95 and eastbound and westbound I-64 approaches to the I-95/I-64 overlap section in Richmond.

Title: Mount Cross Road Widening Phase I
Description: Widen Mount Cross Road from three lanes to four lanes from Old Mount Cross Road to Parker Road. Construct a new bus stop and provide two new buses for a new transit route to Averett University's North Campus.

Title: Route 616 (Dam Town Road) Reconstruction
Description: Widen the graded shoulder and improve clear zone, replace pipe with ditch line grading for positive drainage, and remove brush and trees from sight line along Route 616 (Dam Town Road).

Title: Cranberry Road Improvements
Description: Widen the existing lanes on Cranberry Road from 12 feet to 13 feet, with curb and gutter, between Glendale Road and US 58 (E Stuart Drive). Construct a southbound right-turn lane on Cranberry Road at US 58 (E Stuart Drive).

Title: Intersection Improvements at US 360 (Kings Highway) and Route 47
Description: Replace the existing flashing beacons with a full traffic signal at the intersection of US 360/US 15 (Kings Highway) and Route 47 (Craftons Gate Highway).

Title: Route 624 Reconstruction
Description: Widen Route 624 (Happy Creek Road) to a standard 12-foot width with widened and paved shoulders from the Front Royal Town Limits to approximately 0.90 miles to the east. Construct right-turn and left-turn lanes on Route 624 at Dismal Hollow Road and improve sight distance at the intersection. Improve the right-turn lane at the intersection of Route 624 and Manassas Run Road and improve the alignment and crossing treatment of the existing Norfolk Southern double track.

Title: Maple Avenue and Park Street Signal Reconstruction
Description: Reconstruct the existing traffic signal at the intersection of Maple Avenue E and Park Street NE from two-pole with diagonal mast arms to standard four-pole configuration. Install new audible pedestrian countdown signals and accessible ramps.

Title: Odd Fellows Road Segment B2 Reconstruction
Description: Add a center turn lane along Odd Fellows Road from the US 29 Business (Lynchburg Expressway) ramps to north of Mayflower Drive. Realign the intersection of Odd Fellows Road and Albert Lankford Drive to align with Murry Place and construct a roundabout. Replace the existing bridge over Norfolk Southern Railroad. Construct shared-use path and sidewalk throughout the project corridor.

Title: Route 610 Roadway Improvements
Description: Widen and add curb and gutter to approximately half a mile of Route 610 starting approximately 0.1 miles south of Route 608. Realign Route 912 to make a T intersection with Route 610. Widen southbound Route 610 at Route 660 to provide storage for right turning vehicles.

Title: Norfolk Traffic Control System Platform Upgrade
Description: Upgrade over 300 traffic signal controllers and central software in the City of Norfolk, including ATMS improvements. This technology will permit implementation of transit-priority operations and enhanced pedestrian signal operations.

Title: Route 6 (Patterson Avenue) Traffic Signal
Description: Install a new traffic signal at the intersection of Route 6 (Patterson Avenue) and Route 1250 (West Creek Parkway).

Title: Route 682 Reconstruction
Description: Realign Route 682 (Woodys Lake Road) to smooth existing curvature. Widen road to provide 11- to 12-foot lanes with four-foot ditch and four-foot shoulder.

Title: Route 601 (Buckshoal Road) Roadway Alignment Improvements
Description: Improve a section of Route 601 (Buckshoal Road) between Ramble Road and Hudson Road by realigning the roadway, widening travel lanes, and adjusting the vertical alignment.

Title: US 522 (N Frederick Pike) and Fox Drive Turn Lane Improvements
Description: Construct a dedicated northbound right-turn lane at US 522 (N Frederick Pike) and Fox Drive. Install a concrete median to restrict left-turn movements at the northernmost gas station driveway on the northbound approach.

Title: I-95/I-64 Overlap Lighting Upgrades
Description: Install, upgrade, or replace lighting throughout the I-95/I-64 overlap corridor, including interchanges, with high-mast LED lighting.

Title: US 360 (Richmond Tappahannock Highway)and Sharon Road Park and Ride Improvements
Description: Pave the existing gravel park and ride lot in the southeast corner of US 360 and Sharon Road to add additional spaces (including 2 handicap accessible spaces), drainage improvements, and lighting.

Title: US 460 (Prince Edward Highway) and Route 626 (Prospect Road/Peaks Road) Safety Improvements
Description: Install dynamic flashers on eastbound and westbound US 460 (Prince Edward Highway) in advance of the intersection with Route 626 (Prospect Road/Peaks Road).

Title: Route 670 (Burnt Chimney Road) and Route 834 (Brooks Mill Road) Roundabout
Description: Construct a roundabout at Route 670 (Burnt Chimney Road) and Route 834 (Brooks Mill Road).

Title: Mount Cross Road and Whitmell School Road Intersection Improvements
Description: Construct a westbound offset right-turn lane at Mount Cross Road and Whitmell School Road. Convert one commercial entrance west of the intersection to right-in/right-out.

Title: US 13 (Lankford Highway), Route 695, and Temperanceville Road Intersection Improvements
Description: Install a traffic signal at US 13 (Lankford Highway) and Route 695. Extend northbound and southbound right-turn lanes and northbound left-turn lane at US 13 and Route 695. Close Temperanceville Road access to US 13.

Title: US 13 (Lankford Highway) and Parkway Signal Installation
Description: Install a traffic signal at US 13 (Lankford Highway) and Parkway. Extend the northbound left-turn lane and widen the southbound right-turn lane at US 13 and Parkway. Close the median opening at US 13 and the Eastern Shore Community College Driveway.

Title: US 29 (Amherst Highway) and Route 151 (Patrick Henry Highway) Safety Improvements
Description: Install dynamic flashers on northbound and southbound US 29 (N Amherst Highway) in advance of the intersection with Route 151 (Patrick Henry Highway).

Title: US 17 (Carrollton Boulevard) Crosswalks
Description: Install signalized pedestrian crossings on three legs of the intersection of US 17 (Carrollton Boulevard) and Eagle Harbor Parkway. Install one high-visibility crosswalk with RRFB at the intersection of Smiths Neck Road and Graystone Drive.
